### Guard Non-Empty title

Drops items that fail the condition; only qualifying items continue (no false branch).

# Publish AI clips with HTTP / REST API and Google Drive in real time for Publishing

**Pattern:** Video Production · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Scheduled

## What it does
Publish AI clips with HTTP / REST API and Google Drive in real time for Publishing. It runs automatically on a schedule.

## Why it exists
Manual publishing is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Hourly Schedule → Download from Google Drive → Parse XLSX Contents → Clean & Reshape Rows → Load Rows into Google Sheets → Repack as XLSX → Archive Processed File (Google Drive) → …

## Use it for
- Teams that want to video production without manual effort
- Anyone automating publishing in content creation
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Improves response time
- Saves hours of manual work each week
- Responds in seconds

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Google OAuth2; Google OAuth2 / service account; Slack OAuth2.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your publishing process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
